failures.description: The agent incorrectly selected item 2243454707 at $164.46 as the cheapest available Electric Kettle, despite the tool result showing item 1240311797 at $137.17 as the cheapest.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and showed the Electric Kettle results sorted by ascending price. The first item, 1240311797, was available and priced at $137.17, making it the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer using item 2243454707 at $164.46, which is actually the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This is a direct contradiction of the tool output, so the failure is a misinterpretation of tool output rather than an invalid invocation or underspecified intent.
